constraint.description: Code elements annotated by "@com.buschmais.jqassistant.core.shared.annotation.ToBeRemovedInVersion" will be removed in the given version.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (properties:File:Properties{fileName:"/META-INF/jqassistant.properties"}), (properties)-[:HAS]->(currentMajor:Value{name:"jqassistant.version.major"}), (properties)-[:HAS]->(currentMinor:Value{name:"jqassistant.version.minor"}) MATCH (type:Type)-[:DECLARES*0..]->(element), (element)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->(toBeRemovedInVersion)-[:OF_TYPE]->(:Type{fqn:"com.buschmais.jqassistant.core.shared.annotation.ToBeRemovedInVersion"}), (toBeRemovedInVersion)-[:HAS]->(major:Value{name:"major"}), (toBeRemovedInVersion)-[:HAS]->(minor:Value{name:"minor"}) WHERE major.value = toInteger(currentMajor.value) AND minor.value > toInteger(currentMinor.value) OR major.value > toInteger(currentMajor.value) WITH type, minor, major, CASE WHEN element:Member THEN element END AS member RETURN type as Type, member as Member, minor.value as MinorVersion, major.value AS MajorVersion ORDER BY type.fqn, member.signature

constraint.description: Code elements annotated by "@com.buschmais.jqassistant.core.shared.annotation.ToBeRemovedInVersion" should have been removed in given version.
constraint.cypher: MATCH (properties:File:Properties{fileName:"/META-INF/jqassistant.properties"}), (properties)-[:HAS]->(currentMajor:Value{name:"jqassistant.version.major"}), (properties)-[:HAS]->(currentMinor:Value{name:"jqassistant.version.minor"}) MATCH (type:Type)-[:DECLARES*0..]->(element), (element)-[:ANNOTATED_BY]->(toBeRemovedInVersion)-[:OF_TYPE]->(:Type{fqn:"com.buschmais.jqassistant.core.shared.annotation.ToBeRemovedInVersion"}), (toBeRemovedInVersion)-[:HAS]->(major:Value{name:"major"}), (toBeRemovedInVersion)-[:HAS]->(minor:Value{name:"minor"}) WHERE major.value = toInteger(currentMajor.value) AND minor.value <= toInteger(currentMinor.value) OR major.value < toInteger(currentMajor.value) WITH type, minor, major, CASE WHEN element:Member THEN element END AS member RETURN type as Type, member as Member, minor.value as MinorVersion, major.value AS MajorVersion ORDER BY type.fqn, member.signature
